summary: Testing iteration 32: Column and filter changes in SIGESC. Found one critical bug in students table - hardcoded HTML columns not updated.

ui_bugs.issue: Table columns hardcoded at lines 3506-3511 were NOT updated. Still shows 'Escola' column and missing 'Ano' column. The `columns` array (lines 1419-1422) was updated correctly but is NOT being used - actual table renders with hardcoded <th> elements

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix StudentsComplete.js lines 3506-3511 - Update hardcoded table headers: Remove 'Escola' column <th>, Add 'Ano' column <th> between Turma and Status
CRITICAL: Fix StudentsComplete.js line 3551 - Update hardcoded table data cells: Remove getSchoolName(row.school_id) cell, Add getClassGradeLevel(row.class_id) cell between Turma and Status
Also update lines 3421, 3439, 3455, 3491 (batch mode headers) and corresponding data cells at lines 3549-3560
critical_code_review_comments: The `columns` array at line 1419 is CORRECTLY defined with: Nome, Turma, Ano, Status, Documentos
HOWEVER: The actual table HTML at lines 3506-3511 uses HARDCODED <th> elements that were NOT updated
The columns array appears to be unused - the actual rendering uses direct JSX at line 3404
Backend GET /api/classes/{class_id}/details correctly returns student_series with fallback to class grade_level
Classes page correctly has filterYear dropdown with default 2026 and no 'Ano Letivo' column
Turma/Observações tab correctly has readonly 'Ano/Série' field between Turma and Status

success_rate.backend: 100% (6/6 tests passed, 2 skipped due to rate limiting)

Main agent needs to update lines 3506-3511 (headers) and 3551 (data cell) to match the columns definition. Also batch mode headers at 3421/3439/3455/3491.
